zh.lifeSummary: 當Thomas Tozier於1570年出生在英國英格蘭戴文尼特 白 諾斯 塔福頓時，他的父親James Tozier26歲，母親Joane Archbould23歲。他於1599年1月14日與Charity Tabb在英國英格蘭戴文泰尼布利其結婚。他們至少是2個兒子的父母。他去世於1640年享年70歲。

nameMeanings.name: Tozier
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: variant of   Tozer  . This form of the surname is very rare in Britain and Ireland.

variants.name: Tozer
meanings: English (Devon): occupational name from an agent derivative of Middle English tosen ‘to tease, card’ (Old English tāsian), for someone who teased or carded wool, flax, etc., so as to clean and separate the fibres.
Americanized form of Hungarian Tőzsér: occupational name for a dealer or tradesman, tőzsér, especially one selling cattle.

nameMeanings.name: Thomas
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: New Testament name, borne by one of Christ's twelve apostles, referred to as ‘Thomas, called Didymus’ (John 11:16; 20:24). Didymos is the Greek word for ‘twin’, and the name is the Greek form of an Aramaic byname meaning ‘twin’. The given name has always been popular throughout Christendom, in part because St Thomas's doubts have made him seem a very human character.

en.lifeSummary: When Thomas Tozier was born in 1570, in Nymet by North Tawton, Devon, England, United Kingdom, his father, James Tozier, was 26 and his mother, Joane Archbould, was 23. He married Charity Tabb on 14 January 1599, in Teignbridge, Devon, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 2 sons. He died in 1640, at the age of 70.
